description.en: The China Packaging Federation (CPF) is the national industry organization representing China's packaging manufacturing sector. China is the world's second-largest packaging market and the largest producer of packaging materials including paper and cardboard, plastics, glass, metal, and composite materials. The packaging industry serves as a foundational support sector for food and beverage, pharmaceutical, cosmetics, e-commerce logistics, and consumer goods industries. CPF publishes annual and periodic statistics on packaging industry output value, production volumes by material type, enterprise performance, import and export data, and energy consumption. The federation also tracks green packaging adoption, recyclable material ratios, and compliance with China's plastic restriction policies. CPF's annual China Packaging Industry Development Report provides authoritative benchmarks for supply chain practitioners, sustainability analysts, and regulatory researchers. As China's e-commerce sector—the world's largest—drives exponential growth in corrugated and flexible packaging demand, CPF data has become increasingly critical for logistics, retail, and consumer goods market analysis.
description.zh: 中国包装联合会（中国包装联合会）是代表中国包装制造行业的全国性行业组织。中国是全球第二大包装市场和最大的包装材料生产国，产品涵盖纸和纸板、塑料、玻璃、金属和复合材料。包装行业是食品饮料、医药、化妆品、电商物流和消费品行业的基础性支撑产业。联合会发布包装行业产值、各材质产量、企业经营情况、进出口数据和能源消耗等年度及阶段性统计，同时追踪绿色包装推广、可回收材料比例及限塑政策执行情况。联合会出版《中国包装工业发展报告》，为供应链从业者、可持续发展分析师和政策研究人员提供权威数据参考。随着中国电商——全球最大规模——驱动瓦楞纸箱和软包装需求的爆发式增长，联合会数据对物流、零售和消费品市场分析的价值日益凸显。

en: Annual packaging industry output: total industrial output value and production volumes segmented by material type (paper/cardboard, plastic, glass, metal, composite) and sub-sector
Enterprise performance: revenue, profit margin, employment, and capital expenditure for China's major packaging manufacturers
Import and export statistics: packaging material and finished product trade flows, including China's role in global packaging supply chains
Green packaging indicators: adoption rates of biodegradable materials, recyclable content ratios, and compliance with China's white pollution reduction policies
E-commerce packaging demand: corrugated box and flexible packaging consumption driven by online retail, delivery volume growth, and package return rates
Regional production data: provincial-level packaging output and industry cluster mapping across major manufacturing provinces
Technology and innovation: adoption of smart packaging, active packaging, and sustainable material substitution across food and pharmaceutical segments
Annual China Packaging Industry Development Report: comprehensive industry performance review, market trends, policy impacts, and five-year outlook
zh: 包装行业年度产出：按材质（纸/纸板、塑料、玻璃、金属、复合材料）和子行业细分的总产值和产量
企业经营情况：主要包装制造企业的收入、利润率、从业人员及资本支出
进出口统计：包装材料和成品贸易流量，包括中国在全球包装供应链中的角色
绿色包装指标：可降解材料采用率、可回收成分比例及白色污染治理政策执行情况
电商包装需求：网络零售驱动的瓦楞纸箱和软包装消耗量、快递量增长及退货率
区域生产数据：主要制造省份的省级包装产出和产业集群分布
技术与创新：食品和医药领域智能包装、功能性包装和可持续材料替代应用进展
中国包装工业发展年度报告：行业运行综述、市场趋势、政策影响及五年展望
